name: readme-cinema
description: Transform your README files into cinematic terminal experiences with ASCII art, typewriter effects, and dramatic transitions

scripts.test: node --experimental-vm-modules node_modules/.bin/jest test/basic.test.js test/simple.test.js test/typewriter-effect.test.js test/ascii-banner.test.js test/color-themes.test.js test/progress-bars.test.js test/section-transitions.test.js test/syntax-highlighter.test.js test/main.test.js test/cli.test.js --coverage

author: Ankit Sharma <ankit.sharma199803@gmail.com>
